title: pteroceras spathulatum
intro: Pteroceras spathulatum, also known as the 'Tuberous Orchid', is a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical regions. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pteroceras spathulatum include its ability to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like decoctions, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
